description: Run a Cube semantic-layer query (REST /v1/load) and materialize as a Dagster asset (pandas DataFrame). Great for landing governed metrics in the warehouse or feeding downstream AI/reporting.

query.label: Cube Query
query.description: Cube JSON query: {measures, dimensions, timeDimensions, filters, order, limit, offset}

api_token_env_var.description: JWT env var for Cube Cloud / production. Omit for local dev.
